hypothesis: Conditioning LoQI on the target solvent dielectric constant ε during training and sampling will yield solvent-specific conformer ensembles such that, for Platinum Diverse ligands with TPSA ≥ 60 Å², the median RMSD to crystal-bound conformers decreases by at least 0.05 Å and the mean absolute error of bound–unbound energy differences decreases by at least 0.5 kcal/mol relative to the current unconditioned model trained only at ε ≈ 80 (water) CPCM.
